title: AMA with @squidrouter and @hyperliquidx
summary_title: Hyperliquid's liquidator vault: 11% monthly returns on other traders' losses
summary_description: Jeff reveals how Hyperliquid's vaults let you profit passively when traders get liquidated—with real 10-11% monthly yields so far.

key_moments.label: Zuli introduces Hyperliquid integration work since December
Jeff explains why Hyperliquid built its own L1 instead of using Arbitrum
Squid integration announced as first collaboration, enabling cross-chain deposits
Referral program launch with weekly USDC rewards, limited invites per week
Vaults rebranded, combining Uniswap pools, Yearn, and copy trading features
API trading goes live with Python SDK examples for quant strategies
Liquidator vault explained: passive income from liquidations, 11% APY currently
Roadmap focus: onboarding users and brand redesign over new features

pull_quote: You only need people to get liquidated to profit from it. 11% for something very low risk, I think, is amazing.
